<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="de">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  :root {
    --bg-card:    #ffffff;
    --bg-header:  rgba(0,0,0,0.03);
    --bg-hover:   rgba(0,0,0,0.03);
    --text-1:     #1a1a2e;
    --text-2:     #4a4a6a;
    --text-3:     #9090b0;
    --green:      #58cc02;
    --green-bg:   rgba(88,204,2,0.10);
    --amber:      #ff9600;
    --amber-bg:   rgba(255,150,0,0.10);
    --red:        #ff4b4b;
    --red-bg:     rgba(255,75,75,0.10);
    --blue:       #0078d4;
    --blue-bg:    rgba(0,120,212,0.10);
    --border:     rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
    --radius:     14px;
    --font:       'Nunito', system-ui, sans-serif;
  }

  body { background: transparent; font-family: var(--font); color: var(--text-1); padding: 4px; position: relative; }

  /* ── Toolbar ── */
  .toolbar {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
    padding: 8px 10px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: var(--bg-card);
    border-radius: var(--radius) var(--radius) 0 0;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .toolbar-filters { display: flex; gap: 4px; flex: 1; }
  .filter-btn {
    font-family: var(--font);
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    padding: 4px 12px;
    border-radius: 20px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--text-3);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all .15s;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .filter-btn:hover { color: var(--text-2); border-color: rgba(0,0,0,0.18); }
  .filter-btn.active {
    background: var(--blue-bg);
    color: var(--blue);
    border-color: rgba(0,120,212,0.3);
  }
  .refresh-btn {
    font-family: var(--font);
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    padding: 4px 12px;
    border-radius: 20px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--text-3);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all .15s;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 4px;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .refresh-btn:hover { color: var(--blue); border-color: rgba(0,120,212,0.3); }

  .container {
    background: var(--bg-card);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
  }

  table {
    width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    font-size: 12px;
  }

  thead tr {
    background: var(--bg-header);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }

  th {
    padding: 8px 10px;
    text-align: right;
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: .05em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--text-3);
    white-space: nowrap;
    cursor: pointer;
    user-select: none;
  }
  th:first-child { text-align: left; }
  th.center      { text-align: center; }
  th.group-touch { border-left: 2px solid rgba(0,120,212,0.15); }
  th.group-qt    { border-left: 2px solid rgba(46,158,0,0.15); }
  th.group-conv  { border-left: 2px solid rgba(201,120,0,0.15); }
  th.group-result{ border-left: 2px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08); }
  th.sort-active { color: var(--blue); }
  th .sort-arrow { margin-left: 3px; font-size: 9px; }

  tbody tr {
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    transition: background .12s;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  tbody tr:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  tbody tr:hover { background: var(--bg-hover); }

  td {
    padding: 8px 10px;
    text-align: right;
    color: var(--text-2);
    font-weight: 700;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  td:first-child { text-align: left; }
  td.center      { text-align: center; }
  td.group-touch { border-left: 2px solid rgba(0,120,212,0.10); }
  td.group-qt    { border-left: 2px solid rgba(46,158,0,0.10); }
  td.group-conv  { border-left: 2px solid rgba(201,120,0,0.10); }
  td.group-result{ border-left: 2px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.05); }

  .rep-cell { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; }
  .rep-name  { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text-1); }
  .rep-tags  { display: flex; gap: 4px; }

  .tag {
    font-size: 9px;
    font-weight: 700;
    padding: 1px 6px;
    border-radius: 20px;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
    color: var(--text-3);
    letter-spacing: .04em;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .tag.team-ferdinand { background: rgba(0,120,212,0.10); color: var(--blue); }
  .tag.team-jan       { background: rgba(201,120,0,0.10); color: var(--amber); }
  .tag.team-philipp   { background: rgba(46,158,0,0.10);  color: var(--green); }

  .badge {
    display: inline-block;
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 800;
    padding: 2px 8px;
    border-radius: 20px;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .badge.green  { background: var(--green-bg);  color: var(--green);  }
  .badge.amber  { background: var(--amber-bg);  color: var(--amber);  }
  .badge.red    { background: var(--red-bg);    color: var(--red);    }
  .badge.blue   { background: var(--blue-bg);   color: var(--blue);   }
  .badge.neutral{ background: rgba(0,0,0,0.05); color: var(--text-3); }

  .risk-label {
    display: inline-block;
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 700;
    padding: 2px 8px;
    border-radius: 6px;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .risk-label.sev-3 { background: var(--red-bg);   color: var(--red);   }
  .risk-label.sev-2 { background: var(--amber-bg); color: var(--amber); }
  .risk-label.sev-1 { background: rgba(201,120,0,0.06); color: var(--text-2); }
  .risk-label.sev-0 { color: var(--text-3); }

  .num-red   { color: var(--red);   }
  .num-amber { color: var(--amber); }
  .num-green { color: var(--green); }

  .empty { color: var(--text-3); font-size: 13px; text-align: center; padding: 40px; }

  /* ── Modal ── */
  .modal-overlay {
    display: none;
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.45);
    z-index: 1000;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .modal-overlay.open { display: flex; }

  .modal {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.92);
    backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);
    padding: 24px;
    width: min(98vw, 1200px);
    max-height: 90vh;
    overflow-y: auto;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 16px;
  }

  .modal-header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 12px;
  }
  .modal-name { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 900; color: var(--text-1); }
  .modal-meta { display: flex; gap: 6px; margin-top: 5px; }
  .modal-close {
    background: none;
    border: none;
    font-size: 20px;
    cursor: pointer;
    color: var(--text-3);
    line-height: 1;
    padding: 2px 4px;
  }
  .modal-close:hover { color: var(--text-1); }

  .modal-divider { height: 1px; background: var(--border); }

  .modal-score-row {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 14px;
  }
  .modal-score-val {
    font-size: 42px;
    font-weight: 900;
    line-height: 1;
    min-width: 72px;
  }
  .modal-score-val.red    { color: var(--red); }
  .modal-score-val.amber  { color: var(--amber); }
  .modal-score-val.green  { color: var(--green); }
  .modal-score-val.neutral{ color: var(--text-3); }

  .modal-progress-group { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }
  .modal-progress-label {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--text-3);
  }
  .modal-progress-label span:last-child { color: var(--text-2); font-weight: 700; }
  .progress-track {
    height: 5px;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.07);
    border-radius: 99px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .progress-fill {
    height: 100%;
    border-radius: 99px;
  }
  .progress-fill.blue   { background: var(--blue); }
  .progress-fill.red    { background: var(--red); }
  .progress-fill.amber  { background: var(--amber); }
  .progress-fill.green  { background: var(--green); }

  /* ── Modal Hero Cards (5-col, KPI_Hero_Cards 1:1) ── */
  .modal-hero-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr);
    gap: 8px;
  }
  /* Slightly compact cards within modal context */
  .modal-hero-grid .card { padding: 12px; gap: 8px; }
  .modal-hero-grid .card-value { font-size: 22px; }
  .modal-hero-grid .sub-row { font-size: 11px; }
  .modal-hero-grid .progress-labels { font-size: 9px; }
  .modal-hero-grid .bucket-val { font-size: 13px; }

  /* Card classes (identical to KPI_Hero_Cards) */
  .card {
    background: var(--bg-card, #ffffff);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 16px;
    cursor: default;
    transition: border-color .2s, background .2s;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 10px;
    box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
  }
  .card-label {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: .06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--text-3);
  }
  .card-main {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 8px;
  }
  .card-value {
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: 900;
    line-height: 1;
    color: var(--text-1);
  }
  .divider {
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--border);
  }
  .sub-metrics { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; }
  .sub-row {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    font-size: 12px;
  }
  .sub-label { color: var(--text-3); }
  .sub-value { color: var(--text-2); font-weight: 700; }
  .sub-value.green  { color: var(--green); }
  .sub-value.amber  { color: var(--amber); }
  .sub-value.red    { color: var(--red);   }
  .sub-value.blue   { color: var(--blue);  }
  .progress-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }
  .progress-labels {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    font-size: 10px;
    color: var(--text-3);
  }
  .buckets { display: flex; gap: 6px; }
  .bucket  { flex: 1; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.04); border-radius: 8px; padding: 6px 4px; text-align: center; }
  .bucket-val   { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 800; }
  .bucket-label { font-size: 10px; color: var(--text-3); margin-top: 2px; }
  .bucket.b1 .bucket-val { color: var(--amber); }
  .bucket.b2 .bucket-val { color: var(--red);   }
  .bucket.b3 .bucket-val { color: #b02020;      }
  .wow.green   { color: var(--green); }
  .wow.red     { color: var(--red); }
  .wow.neutral { color: var(--text-3); }

  /* Coverage card extras */
  .section-label { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text-3); }
  .seg-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; font-size: 12px; }
  .seg-name { color: var(--text-2); font-weight: 600; }
  .seg-vals { display: flex; gap: 6px; align-items: center; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-1); }
  .seg-count { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-3); font-weight: 500; }
  .seg-bar { margin-top: 3px; height: 5px; }
  .delta-badge { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 800; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 20px; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .delta-badge.green { background: var(--green-bg); color: var(--green); }
  .delta-badge.red   { background: var(--red-bg);   color: var(--red);   }
  .delta-badge.neutral { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.05); color: var(--text-3); }
  .wow-row { display: flex; gap: 5px; }
  .wow-row .wow-item { flex: 1; }
  .wow-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 5px; }
  .wow-item { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.03); border-radius: 8px; padding: 5px 7px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1px; }
  .wow-item.green { background: var(--green-bg); color: var(--green); }
  .wow-item.red   { background: var(--red-bg);   color: var(--red);   }
  .wow-item.neutral { color: var(--text-2); }
  .wow-item strong { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 900; }
  .wow-item span   { font-size: 10px; opacity: .8; font-weight: 500; }

  .modal-section-title {
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: .06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--text-3);
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }

  .modal-act-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 6px;
  }
  .modal-act-cell {
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 6px 4px;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .modal-act-val   { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text-2); }
  .modal-act-label { font-size: 9px; color: var(--text-3); margin-top: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .04em; }

  .modal-diagnosis {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    padding: 8px 12px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
    color: var(--text-3);
  }
  .modal-diagnosis.sev-3 { background: var(--red-bg);   color: var(--red); }
  .modal-diagnosis.sev-2 { background: var(--amber-bg); color: var(--amber); }
  .modal-diagnosis.sev-1 { background: rgba(201,120,0,0.06); color: var(--text-2); }
  .modal-diagnosis::before { content: ''; width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: currentColor; flex-shrink: 0; }

  /* Mini funnel (matches KPI_Hero_Cards) */
  .funnel-rows       { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:2px; margin-top:4px; }
  .funnel-row        { display:grid; grid-template-columns:70px 32px 1fr; align-items:center; gap:4px; }
  .funnel-label      { font-size:10px; color:#6b7280; white-space:nowrap; }
  .funnel-value      { font-size:11px; font-weight:600; text-align:right; }
  .funnel-bar-track  { height:4px; background:#f3f4f6; border-radius:2px; overflow:hidden; }
  .funnel-bar        { height:4px; border-radius:2px; }
  .funnel-bar.blue   { background:#3b82f6; }
  .funnel-cr         { font-size:10px; color:#6b7280; padding-left:74px; }

  /* ── Activity Funnel (Duolingo Style) ── */
  .act-step            { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }
  .act-step-header     { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; }
  .act-step-icon       { font-size: 13px; line-height: 1; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .act-step-label      { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-2); flex: 1; }
  .act-step-value      { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 900; color: var(--text-1); }
  .act-bar-track       { height: 8px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.06); border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; }
  .act-bar             { height: 8px; border-radius: 4px; }
  .act-bar--blue       { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #3b82f6, #60a5fa); }
  .act-bar--green      { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #10b981, #34d399); }
  .act-bar--purple     { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #8b5cf6, #a78bfa); }
  .act-bar--amber  { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #f59e0b, #fbbf24); }
  .act-bar--red    { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ef4444, #f87171); }
  .act-bar--teal   { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #14b8a6, #5eead4); }
  .act-bar--neutral { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.15); }
  @keyframes barGrow { from { width: 0; } }
  .act-bar { animation: barGrow 0.6s ease-out; }
  .act-breakdown       { display: flex; gap: 5px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .act-chip            { font-size: 10px; color: var(--text-3); background: rgba(0,0,0,0.05); padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 10px; }
  .act-conv            { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; }
  .act-conv-line       { flex: 1; height: 1px; background: var(--border); }
  .act-conv-pct        { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text-3); white-space: nowrap; }

  /* ── Pipeline Gesundheit sections (modal) ── */
  .ph-section       { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }
  .ph-section-title { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text-2); display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 5px; }
  .ph-def           { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 400; color: var(--text-3); }
  .ph-row           { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; }
  .ph-label         { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-3); }
  .ph-value         { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-1); }
  .ph-value.red     { color: var(--red); }
  .ph-value.amber   { color: var(--amber); }
  .ph-value.green   { color: var(--green); }

  /* ── Group Headers ── */
  .group-header-row th  { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase;
                          letter-spacing: 0.5px; padding: 4px 6px; color: var(--text-3); }
  .gh                   { text-align: center; border-bottom: 3px solid transparent; }
  .gh-blue              { border-bottom-color: #3b82f6; color: #3b82f6; }
  .gh-green             { border-bottom-color: #10b981; color: #10b981; }
  .gh-amber             { border-bottom-color: #f59e0b; color: #f59e0b; }
  .gh-gray              { border-bottom-color: #6b7280; color: #6b7280; }
  .gh-purple            { border-bottom-color: #8b5cf6; color: #8b5cf6; }

  /* ── Mini Bars ── */
  .mini-bar-track       { height: 3px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.06); border-radius: 2px;
                          margin-top: 2px; overflow: hidden; }
  .mini-bar             { height: 3px; border-radius: 2px; }
  .mini-bar--blue       { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #3b82f6, #60a5fa); }
  .mini-bar--green      { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #10b981, #34d399); }

  /* ── Trend Arrows ── */
  .trend                { font-size: 10px; margin-left: 2px; }
  .trend.green          { color: var(--green); }
  .trend.red            { color: var(--red); }
  .trend.neutral        { color: var(--text-3); }

  /* ── Cell Layout ── */
  .cell-val             { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 2px; }
  .sub-col              { color: var(--text-3); font-size: 11px; text-align: right; }
  .td-name              { text-align: left !important; white-space: nowrap; }
  .th-left              { text-align: left !important; }

  /* ── Star Performer ── */
  .medal                { font-size: 13px; }
        .team-tag              { display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; padding: 1px 4px; border-radius: 4px; margin-left: 2px; vertical-align: middle; }
        .team-tag--wolves      { background: rgba(99,102,241,0.12); }
        .team-tag--titans      { background: rgba(245,158,11,0.12); }
        .team-tag--locos       { background: rgba(239,68,68,0.12); }
        

  /* ── Composite Badge ── */
  .comp-badge           { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 12px;
                          font-size: 11px; font-weight: 800; }
  .comp-badge.cmt-green  { background: #e8f5e9; color: #2e7d32; border: 1px solid #a5d6a7; }
  .comp-badge.cmt-amber  { background: #fff3e0; color: #e65100; border: 1px solid #ffcc80; }
  .comp-badge.cmt-red    { background: #ffebee; color: #c62828; border: 1px solid #ef9a9a; }
  .comp-badge.green, .comp-badge.fc-green  { background: rgba(16,185,129,0.15); color: #059669; }
  .comp-badge.amber, .comp-badge.fc-amber  { background: rgba(245,158,11,0.15);  color: #d97706; }
  .comp-badge.red,   .comp-badge.fc-red    { background: rgba(239,68,68,0.15);   color: #dc2626; }

  /* ── Level Tag ── */
  .level-tag            { font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; padding: 1px 5px; border-radius: 8px;
                          background: rgba(0,0,0,0.06); color: var(--text-3); margin-left: 4px; }

  /* ── Benchmark Coloring ── */
  .num-green            { color: #059669 !important; font-weight: 700; }
  .num-amber            { color: #d97706 !important; font-weight: 700; }
  .num-red              { color: #dc2626 !important; font-weight: 700; }

  /* ── Col header row ── */
  .col-header-row th    { font-size: 10px; padding: 5px 6px; }

  /* ── Duolingo Animations ── */
  @keyframes fadeInUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }
  @keyframes slideIn {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-12px) scale(0.97); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); }
  }
  @keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
    50%       { transform: scale(1.35); opacity: 0.7; }
  }
  @keyframes miniBarGrow {
    from { width: 0 !important; }
  }
  @keyframes badgePop {
    0%   { transform: scale(0.7); opacity: 0; }
    80%  { transform: scale(1.1); }
    100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
  }
  @keyframes sparkDraw {
    from { stroke-dashoffset: 1000; }
    to   { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
  }

  /* ── Row Stagger ── */
  .row-anim { animation: fadeInUp 0.3s ease both; }

  /* ── Hover Transform ── */
  tbody tr:hover { background: rgba(0,120,212,0.04) !important; transform: translateX(1px); transition: background .12s, transform .12s; }

  /* ── Mini-bar grow ── */
  .mini-bar { animation: miniBarGrow 0.6s ease both; }

  /* ── Badge pop ── */
  .comp-badge { animation: badgePop 0.4s ease both; }

  /* ── Cell Drilldown ── */
  .cell-drilldown {
    cursor: pointer;
    text-decoration: underline dotted;
    text-underline-offset: 2px;
  }
  .cell-drilldown:hover { color: var(--blue) !important; }

  /* ── Spark Popup ── */
  #spark-popup {
    display: none;
    position: fixed;
    z-index: 2000;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.97);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.16);
    padding: 14px 16px;
    min-width: 320px;
    max-width: 360px;
    animation: slideIn 0.2s ease;
  }
  #spark-popup.open { display: block; }
  .spark-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .spark-title { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text-1); }
  .spark-close {
    background: none; border: none; font-size: 16px;
    cursor: pointer; color: var(--text-3); line-height: 1; padding: 2px 4px;
  }
  .spark-close:hover { color: var(--text-1); }
  .spark-chart { line-height: 0; }

  /* ── Coaching Card ── */
  .coaching-card {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0,120,212,0.06), rgba(88,204,2,0.06));
    border: 1px solid rgba(0,120,212,0.12);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 14px 16px;
    margin-top: 4px;
  }
  .coaching-card-title {
    font-size: 11px; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: .06em; color: var(--text-3); margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .coaching-tip {
    display: flex; gap: 10px; padding: 8px 10px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); border-radius: 8px;
    margin-bottom: 6px; align-items: flex-start;
  }
  .coaching-tip:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
  .coaching-tip-emoji { font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.3; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .coaching-tip-title { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text-1); }
  .coaching-tip-detail { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-3); margin-top: 2px; }

  /* ── Sub-note ── */
  .sub-note { font-size: 10px; color: var(--text-3); margin-top: 2px; }

</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="container" id="container">
  <div class="toolbar" id="toolbar">
    <div class="toolbar-filters" id="filter-btns">
      <button class="filter-btn active" onclick="setFilter('all')">Alle</button>
      <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setFilter('wolves')">Wolves</button>
      <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setFilter('titans')">Titans</button>
      <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setFilter('locos')">Locos</button>
    </div>
    <select id="quarter-select" style="margin-left:12px;padding:5px 10px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.15);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;background:#fff;color:#1a1a2e;cursor:pointer" onchange="setQuarter(this.value)">
    </select>
    <button class="refresh-btn" onclick="doRefresh()">↻ Aktualisieren</button>
  </div>
  <div id="table-wrap">
    <div class="empty">Lade Daten…</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="modal-overlay" id="modal-overlay" onclick="closeModal(event)">
  <div class="modal" id="modal-content" onclick="event.stopPropagation()"></div>
</div>
<div id="spark-popup">
  <div class="spark-header">
    <span class="spark-title"></span>
    <button class="spark-close" onclick="closeSparkPopup()">✕</button>
  </div>
  <div class="spark-chart"></div>
</div>

<script>
  var _allReps    = [];
  var _medals     = {};
  var _weeklyData = {};
  var _wk         = {};
  var _staleList  = [];
  var _teamFilter = 'all';
  var _sortCol    = 'composite';
  var _sortDir    = 'desc';
  var _weeksElapsed = 1;

  function fmt(n) {
    if (!n) return '—';
    const abs = Math.round(Math.abs(n));
    if (abs >= 1000000) return (abs/1000000).toFixed(1).replace('.',',') + ' Mio.';
    if (abs >= 1000)    return Math.round(abs/1000) + 'k';
    return abs.toString();
  }
  function fmtFull(n) {
    if (!n || n === 0) return '€ 0';
    const abs = Math.round(Math.abs(n));
    return '€ ' + abs.toString().replace(/\B(?=(\d{3})+(?!\d))/g, '.');
  }
  function fmtN(n) { return (n || 0).toString().replace(/\B(?=(\d{3})+(?!\d))/g, '.'); }
  function statusLabel(s) {
    return { green: 'Gesund', amber: 'Warnung', red: 'Kritisch' }[s] || '—';
  }
  function col(s) {
    return { green: 'var(--green)', amber: 'var(--amber)', red: 'var(--red)' }[s] || 'var(--text-2)';
  }
  function pct(n) { return (n || 0) + '\u202f%'; }
    function fmtD(n) { return ((n || 0).toFixed(1)).replace('.', ','); }
  function clamp(v, mn, mx) { return Math.max(mn, Math.min(mx, v)); }

  function teamClass(team) {
    return { ferdinand: 'team-ferdinand', jan: 'team-jan', philipp: 'team-philipp' }[team] || '';
  }
  function teamEmoji(team) {
    return { wolves: '🐺', titans: '⚡', locos: '😈' }[team] || '';
  }
  function teamLabel(team) {
    return { wolves: 'Wolves', titans: 'Titans', locos: 'Locos' }[team] || (team || '—');
  }
  function levelLabel(level) {
    return { '3': 'L3', '2': 'L2', '1': 'L1', 'rampup': 'Ramp' }[level] || 'L2';
  }
  function statusColor(v, thresholds, inverted) {
    if (inverted) {
      if (v <= thresholds[0]) return 'num-green';
      if (v <= thresholds[1]) return 'num-amber';
      return 'num-red';
    }
    if (v >= thresholds[0]) return 'num-green';
    if (v >= thresholds[1]) return 'num-amber';
    return 'num-red';
  }

  function setFilter(team) {
    _teamFilter = team;
    document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(function(b) {
      b.classList.toggle('active', b.getAttribute('onclick').indexOf("'" + team + "'") !== -1);
    });
    renderTable();
    var evtMap = { all: 'onFilterAll', wolves: 'onFilterWolves', titans: 'onFilterTitans', locos: 'onFilterLocos' };
    if (typeof appsmith !== 'undefined' && evtMap[team]) {
      appsmith.triggerEvent(evtMap[team]);
    }
  }

  // ── Quartals-Filter ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  var _currentQuarter = null;

  function setQuarter(val) {
    _currentQuarter = val;
    appsmith.triggerEvent('onQuarterChange', { quarter: val });
  }

  function populateQuarterDropdown(model) {
    var sel = document.getElementById('quarter-select');
    if (!sel) return;
    var opts = (model && model.quarterOptions) ? model.quarterOptions : [];
    var curr = (model && model.selectedQuarter) ? model.selectedQuarter : '';
    sel.innerHTML = '';
    if (!opts.length) {
      var opt = document.createElement('option');
      opt.value = '';
      opt.textContent = 'Laufendes Quartal';
      sel.appendChild(opt);
      return;
    }
    opts.forEach(function(o) {
      var opt = document.createElement('option');
      opt.value = o.value;
      opt.textContent = o.label;
      if (o.value === curr) opt.selected = true;
      sel.appendChild(opt);
    });
  }


  function doRefresh() {
    if (typeof appsmith !== 'undefined') {
      appsmith.triggerEvent('onRefresh');
    }
  }

  function sortBy(col) {
    if (_sortCol === col) {
      _sortDir = _sortDir === 'desc' ? 'asc' : 'desc';
    } else {
      _sortCol = col;
      _sortDir = 'desc';
    }
    renderTable();
  }

  function filteredSortedReps() {
    var reps = _teamFilter === 'all'
      ? _allReps.slice()
      : _allReps.filter(function(r) { return r.team === _teamFilter; });

    var col = _sortCol;
    var dir = _sortDir === 'desc' ? -1 : 1;

    reps.sort(function(a, b) {
      var av = 0, bv = 0;
      if      (col === 'name')     { return dir * (a.repName||'').localeCompare(b.repName||''); }
      else if (col === 'touch')    { av = a.l30TouchPerDay     || 0; bv = b.l30TouchPerDay     || 0; }
      else if (col === 'calls')    { av = a.l30DialsPerDay     || 0; bv = b.l30DialsPerDay     || 0; }
      else if (col === 'mails')    { av = a.l30EmailsPerDay    || 0; bv = b.l30EmailsPerDay    || 0; }
      else if (col === 'qt')       { av = a.l30QualPerDay      || 0; bv = b.l30QualPerDay      || 0; }
      else if (col === 'qc')       { av = a.l30QualCallsPerDay || 0; bv = b.l30QualCallsPerDay || 0; }
      else if (col === 'mtg')      { av = a.l30MeetingsPerDay  || 0; bv = b.l30MeetingsPerDay  || 0; }
      else if (col === 'tToQt')    { av = a.l30TouchToQual     || 0; bv = b.l30TouchToQual     || 0; }
      else if (col === 'qtToO')    { av = a.l30QualToOpp       || 0; bv = b.l30QualToOpp       || 0; }
      else if (col === 'oppPerDay') { av = a.l30OppPerDay       || 0; bv = b.l30OppPerDay       || 0; }
      else if (col === 'cov')      { av = a.coverageVal        || 0; bv = b.coverageVal        || 0; }
      else if (col === 'stale')    { av = 100-(a.staleRateVal||0); bv = 100-(b.staleRateVal||0); }
      else if (col === 'ovd')      { av = a.overdueCount       || 0; bv = b.overdueCount       || 0; }
      else if (col === 'pilots')   { av = a.pilotenCount       || 0; bv = b.pilotenCount       || 0; }
      else if (col === 'bookings') { av = a.bookingsARR        || 0; bv = b.bookingsARR        || 0; }
      else if (col === 'wr')       { av = a.winRateVal         || 0; bv = b.winRateVal         || 0; }
      else if (col === 'composite'){ av = a.composite          || 0; bv = b.composite          || 0; }
      else if (col === 'fc')       { av = a.compositeForecast  || 0; bv = b.compositeForecast  || 0; }
      else if (col === 'cmt')      { av = a.commitAtt          || 0; bv = b.commitAtt          || 0; }
      else if (col === 'dev')      { av = a.commitDeviation    || 0; bv = b.commitDeviation    || 0; }
      return (av - bv) * dir;
    });
    return reps;
  }

  function arrowHtml(col) {
    if (_sortCol !== col) return '<span class="sort-arrow" style="opacity:.3">↕</span>';
    return '<span class="sort-arrow">' + (_sortDir === 'desc' ? '↓' : '↑') + '</span>';
  }

  function thClass(col, extra) {
    var cls = extra || '';
    if (_sortCol === col) cls += ' sort-active';
    return cls;
  }

  function pctOf(val, max) { return max > 0 ? Math.round((val || 0) / max * 100) : 0; }
  function fcStatus(v)      { return (v||0) >= 80 ? 'green' : (v||0) >= 60 ? 'amber' : 'red'; }
  function deviationCls(v)   { return (v||0) >= 0 ? 'green' : (v||0) >= -10 ? 'amber' : 'red'; }
  function pilotStatus(r) {
    if (!r.pilotenTarget) return '';
    var p = (r.pilotenCount || 0) / r.pilotenTarget * 100;
    return p >= 100 ? 'num-green' : p >= 60 ? 'num-amber' : 'num-red';
  }

  function renderTable() {
    var reps = filteredSortedReps();
    var c = document.getElementById('table-wrap');

    if (!reps.length) {
      c.innerHTML = '<div class="empty">Keine Daten</div>';
      return;
    }

    // Pre-pass: maxima for mini-bars + medal map (top 3 by composite, all reps)
    var maxTouch = 0, maxQT = 0;
    reps.forEach(function(r) {
      var t = r.l30TouchPerDay || 0;
      var q = r.l30QualPerDay  || 0;
      if (t > maxTouch) maxTouch = t;
      if (q > maxQT)    maxQT    = q;
    });

    // Medals: top 3 by composite across ALL reps (global ranking)
    var _medalsSorted = _allReps.slice().sort(function(a,b){ return (b.composite||0)-(a.composite||0); });
    _medals = {};
    if (_medalsSorted[0]) _medals[_medalsSorted[0].id] = '🥇';
    if (_medalsSorted[1]) _medals[_medalsSorted[1].id] = '🥈';
    if (_medalsSorted[2]) _medals[_medalsSorted[2].id] = '🥉';

    // Group header row
    var groupRow =
      '<tr class="group-header-row">' +
        '<th></th>' +
        '<th colspan="6" class="gh gh-blue">📞 Aktivität (L30/Tag)</th>' +
        '<th colspan="3" class="gh gh-green">🎯 Conversion</th>' +
        '<th colspan="3" class="gh gh-amber">📊 Pipeline</th>' +
        '<th colspan="3" class="gh gh-gray">🏆 Results</th>' +
        '<th colspan="4" class="gh gh-purple">🔮 Forecast</th>' +
      '</tr>';

    // Column header row
    var colRow =
      '<tr class="col-header-row">' +
        th2('name', 'Rep', 'left', 'Rep-Name, Level und Team') +
        th2('touch',    'Touch',  null, 'Touchpoints/Tag: Calls + Emails (Meetings zählen nicht, Ø letzte 30 Arbeitstage)') +
        th2('calls',    'Calls',  null, 'Anrufe pro Arbeitstag (Ø L30)') +
        th2('mails',    'Mails',  null, 'E-Mails pro Arbeitstag (Ø L30)') +
        th2('qt',       'QT',     null, 'Qualifizierte Touchpoints pro Arbeitstag (Ø L30)') +
        th2('qc',       'QC',     null, 'Qualifizierte Anrufe pro Arbeitstag (Ø L30)') +
        th2('mtg',      'Mtg',    null, 'Meetings pro Arbeitstag (Ø L30)') +
        th2('tToQt',    'T→QT',   null, 'Touch-zu-Qual-Rate: Anteil qualifizierter Touchpoints (L30)') +
        th2('qtToO',    'QT→O',   null, 'Qual-zu-Opp-Rate: Anteil qualifizierter Touchpoints die zu Opps werden (L30)') +
        th2('oppPerDay','O/D',    null, 'Neu erstellte Opps pro Arbeitstag (Ø L30). Pfeil = Trend CW vs. L30-Schnitt') +
        th2('cov',      'Cov',    null, 'Pipeline Coverage: offene Pipeline ÷ verbleibende Quota. Ziel: ≥ 2,5×') +
        th2('stale',    'Pipe%',  null, 'Pipeline-Gesundheit: Anteil offener Opps MIT Aktivität. 100 % = keine Stale Opps. Ziel: ≥ 85 %') +
        th2('ovd',      'Ovd',    null, 'Überfällige Opps: CloseDate liegt in der Vergangenheit und Opp ist noch offen') +
        th2('pilots',   'Pilots', null, 'Pilot-Deals QTD vs. Quartalsziel') +
        th2('bookings', 'Book.',  null, 'Gebuchter ARR QTD (rep-getrieben, ohne Self-Service)') +
        th2('wr',       'WR%',    null, 'Win Rate: gewonnene ÷ (gewonnene + verlorene) Opps, letzte 90 Tage. Ziel: ≥ 30 %') +
        th2('composite','Comp',   null, 'Composite TA: gewichteter Zielerreichungsgrad (Bookings + Piloten je nach Level)') +
        th2('cmt',      'Commit', null, 'SF Forecast Commit: abgegebener Forecast des Reps als % vom Target') +
        th2('fc',       'HR',     null, 'Hochrechnung: Prognose am Quartalsende bei aktuellem Run-Rate-Tempo') +
        th2('dev',      'Δ%',     null, 'Abweichung: Commit vs. HR. + = Commit optimistischer als HR, − = konservativ') +
      '</tr>';

    function th2(col, label, align, tip) {
      var cls = (_sortCol === col) ? 'sort-active' : '';
      if (align === 'left') cls += ' th-left';
      var arrow = (_sortCol === col)
        ? '<span class="sort-arrow">' + (_sortDir === 'desc' ? '↓' : '↑') + '</span>'
        : '<span class="sort-arrow" style="opacity:.3">↕</span>';
      var t = tip ? ' title="' + tip + '"' : '';
      return '<th onclick="sortBy(\'' + col + '\')" class="' + cls.trim() + '"' + t + '>' + label + arrow + '</th>';
    }

    function fmtD(v) { return v != null ? v.toFixed(1).replace('.', ',') : '—'; }
    function pct2(v) { return v != null ? Math.round(v) + '%' : '—'; }
    function fmt2(v) {
      if (v == null) return '—';
      if (v >= 1000000) return (v/1000000).toFixed(1).replace('.',',') + 'M';
      if (v >= 1000)    return Math.round(v/1000) + 'k';
      return Math.round(v) + '';
    }
    function sc(val, thresholds, inverted) {
      var v = val || 0;
      if (!inverted) {
        return v >= thresholds.green ? 'num-green' : v >= thresholds.amber ? 'num-amber' : 'num-red';
      } else {
        return v <= thresholds.green ? 'num-green' : v <= thresholds.amber ? 'num-amber' : 'num-red';
      }
    }

    var rows = '';
    reps.forEach(function(r, i) {
      var tT = r.l30TrendTouch || { arrow: '→', cls: 'neutral' };
      var tQ = r.l30TrendQual  || { arrow: '→', cls: 'neutral' };

      var touchPct = pctOf(r.l30TouchPerDay, maxTouch);
      var qtPct    = pctOf(r.l30QualPerDay, maxQT);

      var pilotsStr = r.pilotenTarget > 0
        ? (r.pilotenCount || 0) + '/' + r.pilotenTarget
        : (r.pilotenCount || 0) + '';

      var ovdCls = (r.overdueCount||0) > 5 ? 'num-red' : (r.overdueCount||0) > 0 ? 'num-amber' : '';
      var fcCls  = fcStatus(r.compositeForecast);
      var cmpCls = r.overallStatus || fcStatus(r.composite);

      var _sbc = r.overallStatus === 'green' ? '#58cc02' : r.overallStatus === 'red' ? '#ff4b4b' : '#ff9600';
      rows +=
        '<tr onclick="openModal(\'' + r.id + '\')" class="row-anim" style="border-left: 3px solid ' + _sbc + '; animation-delay: ' + (i * 0.03).toFixed(2) + 's">' +
        // Rep name + medal + level tag + team tag
        '<td class="td-name">' +
          (_medals[r.id] ? '<span class="medal">' + _medals[r.id] + '</span> ' : '') +
          (r.repName || '—') +
          ' <span class="level-tag">' + levelLabel(r.level) + (r.isRampup ? ' <span class="ramp-tag" title="Ramp-up (Probezeit)">🌱</span>' : '') + '</span>' +
          ' <span class="team-tag team-tag--' + (r.team||'') + '" title="' + teamLabel(r.team) + '">' + teamEmoji(r.team) + '</span>' +
        '</td>' +
        // Touch/Tag with mini-bar + trend
        '<td class="' + sc(r.l30TouchPerDay, {green:30, amber:20}) + '">' +
          '<div class="cell-val"><span class="cell-drilldown" onclick="event.stopPropagation();openSparkPopup(event,\'' + r.id + '\',\'touch\')">' + fmtD(r.l30TouchPerDay) + '</span>' +
            ' <span class="trend ' + tT.cls + '">' + tT.arrow + '</span>' +
          '</div>' +
          '<div class="mini-bar-track"><div class="mini-bar mini-bar--blue" style="width:' + touchPct + '%"></div></div>' +
        '</td>' +
        // Calls
        '<td class="sub-col"><span class="cell-drilldown" onclick="event.stopPropagation();openSparkPopup(event,\'' + r.id + '\',\'calls\')">' + fmtD(r.l30DialsPerDay) + '</span></td>' +
        // Mails
        '<td class="sub-col"><span class="cell-drilldown" onclick="event.stopPropagation();openSparkPopup(event,\'' + r.id + '\',\'mails\')">' + fmtD(r.l30EmailsPerDay) + '</span></td>' +
        // QT with mini-bar + trend
        '<td class="' + sc(r.l30QualPerDay, {green:5, amber:3}) + '">' +
          '<div class="cell-val"><span class="cell-drilldown" onclick="event.stopPropagation();openSparkPopup(event,\'' + r.id + '\',\'qt\')">' + fmtD(r.l30QualPerDay) + '</span>' +
            ' <span class="trend ' + tQ.cls + '">' + tQ.arrow + '</span>' +
          '</div>' +
          '<div class="mini-bar-track"><div class="mini-bar mini-bar--green" style="width:' + qtPct + '%"></div></div>' +
        '</td>' +
        // QC
        '<td class="sub-col"><span class="cell-drilldown" onclick="event.stopPropagation();openSparkPopup(event,\'' + r.id + '\',\'qc\')">' + fmtD(r.l30QualCallsPerDay) + '</span></td>' +
        // Meetings

  function coachingTips(r) {
    var tips = [];
    var level = r.level || '2';
    var bm = { '3': 25, '2': 30, '1': 35, 'rampup': 30 }[level] || 30;
    var quarterProgress = (_wk && _wk.total > 0) ? (_wk.done / _wk.total) : 0.5;
    if ((r.l30TouchPerDay || 0) < bm * 0.7) {
      var lowAct = (r.l30DialsPerDay || 0) < (r.l30EmailsPerDay || 0) ? 'Calls' : 'Mails';
      tips.push({ prio: 1, emoji: '📞', title: 'Mehr Aktivität', detail: 'Touch/Tag ' + fmtD(r.l30TouchPerDay || 0) + ' vs. Benchmark ' + bm + '. Fokus auf ' + lowAct + '.' });
    }
    if ((r.l30TouchToQual || 0) < 10) {
      tips.push({ prio: 1, emoji: '🎯', title: 'Gesprächsqualität', detail: 'Nur ' + Math.round(r.l30TouchToQual || 0) + '% Touch→Qual. Pitch-Coaching oder Zielgruppen-Review.' });
    }
    if ((r.coverageVal || 0) < 1.5) {
      tips.push({ prio: 1, emoji: '🚨', title: 'Pipeline aufbauen', detail: 'Coverage ' + fmtD(r.coverageVal || 0) + 'x (Ziel 2,5x). Mehr Opportunities generieren.' });
    }
    if ((r.staleRateVal || 0) > 30) {
      tips.push({ prio: 2, emoji: '🧹', title: 'Pipeline aufräumen', detail: (r.staleCount || 0) + ' Opps seit >14 Tagen ohne Aktivität.' });
    }
    if ((r.overdueCount || 0) > 3) {
      tips.push({ prio: 2, emoji: '⏰', title: 'Überfällige Deals', detail: (r.overdueCount || 0) + ' Opps mit abgelaufenem CloseDate.' });
    }
    if ((r.winRateVal || 0) < 20) {
      tips.push({ prio: 2, emoji: '📉', title: 'Win Rate bei ' + Math.round(r.winRateVal || 0) + '%', detail: 'Deal-Qualification prüfen.' });
    }
    if ((r.pilotenWeight || 0) > 0 && (r.pilotenAtt || 0) < (quarterProgress * 100 - 10)) {
      tips.push({ prio: 2, emoji: '🎯', title: 'Piloten-Rückstand', detail: (r.pilotenCount || 0) + '/' + (r.pilotenTarget || 0) + '. Pilot-Opps pushen.' });
    }
    if ((r.compositeForecast || 0) < 80) {
      tips.push({ prio: 3, emoji: '🔮', title: 'Forecast bei ' + Math.round(r.compositeForecast || 0) + '%', detail: 'Pipeline-Aufbau + Deal-Acceleration nötig.' });
    }
    tips.sort(function(a, b) { return a.prio - b.prio; });
    tips = tips.slice(0, 3);
    if (!tips.length) {
      tips.push({ prio: 0, emoji: '✅', title: 'Auf Kurs!', detail: 'Alle KPIs im grünen Bereich.' });
    }
    return tips;
  }

  function svgSparkline(points, opts) {
    opts = opts || {};
    var W = 280, H = 130, pL = 28, pR = 14, pT = 12, pB = 24;
    var iW = W - pL - pR, iH = H - pT - pB;
    if (!points || points.length < 2) {
      return '<svg viewBox="0 0 ' + W + ' ' + H + '" style="width:100%;height:' + H + 'px"><text x="' + (W/2) + '" y="' + (H/2+4) + '" text-anchor="middle" fill="#9090b0" font-size="12" font-family="system-ui">Keine Daten</text></svg>';
    }
    var vals = points.map(function(p) { return p.value || 0; });
    var maxV = opts.yMax != null ? opts.yMax : Math.max.apply(null, vals.concat([0.01]));
    function xp(i) { return pL + (points.length > 1 ? (i / (points.length - 1)) * iW : iW / 2); }
    function yp(v) { return pT + iH - (v / (maxV || 1)) * iH; }
    var path = points.map(function(p, i) { return (i === 0 ? 'M' : 'L') + xp(i).toFixed(1) + ',' + yp(p.value || 0).toFixed(1); }).join(' ');
    var fill = path + ' L' + xp(points.length-1).toFixed(1) + ',' + (pT+iH) + ' L' + pL + ',' + (pT+iH) + ' Z';
    var gid = 'g' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 5);
    var c = opts.color || '#0078d4';
    var pl = iW * 1.6;
    var refHtml = '';
    if (opts.refValue != null) {
      var ry = yp(Math.min(opts.refValue, maxV * 1.05)).toFixed(1);
      refHtml = '<line x1="' + pL + '" y1="' + ry + '" x2="' + (pL+iW) + '" y2="' + ry + '" stroke="#9090b0" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,3" opacity="0.6"/><text x="' + (pL+iW+2) + '" y="' + (Number(ry)+4) + '" font-size="9" fill="#9090b0">BM</text>';
    }
    var line2Html = '';
    if (opts.line2 && opts.line2.length >= 2) {
      var p2 = opts.line2;
      var maxV2 = opts.yMax != null ? opts.yMax : Math.max(maxV, Math.max.apply(null, p2.map(function(p) { return p.value || 0; })));
      function yp2(v) { return pT + iH - (v / (maxV2 || 1)) * iH; }
      var path2 = p2.map(function(p, i) { return (i===0?'M':'L') + xp(i).toFixed(1) + ',' + yp2(p.value||0).toFixed(1); }).join(' ');
      line2Html = '<path d="' + path2 + '" fill="none" stroke="#9090b0" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="5,3" opacity="0.7"/>';
    }
    var xLabels = '';
    points.forEach(function(p, i) {
      if (i === 0 || i === points.length-1 || points.length <= 6) {
        xLabels += '<text x="' + xp(i).toFixed(1) + '" y="' + (H-5) + '" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#9090b0" font-family="system-ui">' + (p.label||'') + '</text>';
      }
    });
    var dots = points.map(function(p, i) {
      return '<circle cx="' + xp(i).toFixed(1) + '" cy="' + yp(p.value||0).toFixed(1) + '" r="3" fill="' + c + '" opacity="0.9"><title>' + (p.label||'') + ': ' + (p.value||0) + '</title></circle>';
    }).join('');
    return '<svg viewBox="0 0 ' + W + ' ' + H + '" style="width:100%;height:' + H + 'px" font-family="system-ui">' +
      '<defs><linearGradient id="' + gid + '" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">' +
        '<stop offset="0%" stop-color="' + c + '" stop-opacity="0.2"/>' +
        '<stop offset="100%" stop-color="' + c + '" stop-opacity="0.01"/>' +
      '</linearGradient></defs>' +
      '<path d="' + fill + '" fill="url(#' + gid + ')"/>' +
      refHtml + line2Html +
      '<path d="' + path + '" fill="none" stroke="' + c + '" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-dasharray="' + pl + '" stroke-dashoffset="' + pl + '" style="animation:sparkDraw 0.8s ease forwards"/>' +
      '<text x="' + (pL-2) + '" y="' + (pT+5) + '" text-anchor="end" font-size="9" fill="#9090b0">' + Math.round(maxV) + '</text>' +
      '<text x="' + (pL-2) + '" y="' + (pT+iH) + '" text-anchor="end" font-size="9" fill="#9090b0">0</text>' +
      xLabels + dots + '</svg>';
  }

        title: _DRILLDOWN_TITLES[metric] || metric,
      }});
      appsmith.triggerEvent('onDrilldown');
    }
  }

  function render(model) {
    populateQuarterDropdown(model);
    var reps = model.reps || [];
    _weeksElapsed = Math.max(1, model.weeksElapsed || 1);
    _allReps = reps;
    _staleList = model.staleList || [];
    _wk = model.wk || {};
    _weeklyData = model.weeklyData || {};
    renderTable();
  }

  function extract(m) {
    if (!m) return { reps: [], weeksElapsed: 1, staleList: [], weeklyData: {} };
    return {
      reps:         Array.isArray(m) ? m : (m.reps || []),
      weeksElapsed: m.weeksElapsed || 1,
      staleList:    m.staleList || [],
      wk:           m.wk || {},
      weeklyData:   m.weeklyData || {},
    };
  }

  function modelKey(m) {
    return (m && m.reps || []).reduce(function(s,r){ return s+(r.bookingsTarget||0); }, 0);
  }

  var _lastKey = null;
  function poll() {
    if (typeof appsmith !== 'undefined' && appsmith.model) {
      var key = modelKey(appsmith.model);
      if (key !== _lastKey) { _lastKey = key; render(extract(appsmith.model)); }
    }
    setTimeout(poll, 300);
  }

  if (typeof appsmith !== 'undefined') {
    appsmith.onReady(function() { render(extract(appsmith.model)); poll(); });
    appsmith.onModelChange(function(m) { render(extract(m)); });
  } else {
    render({ reps: [], weeksElapsed: 1, staleList: [] });

<!DOCTYPE html>

  /* ── Toolbar ── */

  .container {

  table {

        .team-tag--titans      { background: rgba(245,158,11,0.12); }
        .team-tag--locos       { background: rgba(239,68,68,0.12); }
        

  /* ── Composite Badge ── */
  .comp-badge           { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 12px;
                          font-size: 11px; font-weight: 800; }
  .comp-badge.cmt-green  { background: #e8f5e9; color: #2e7d32; border: 1px solid #a5d6a7; }
  .comp-badge.cmt-amber  { background: #fff3e0; color: #e65100; border: 1px solid #ffcc80; }
  .comp-badge.cmt-red    { background: #ffebee; color: #c62828; border: 1px solid #ef9a9a; }
  .comp-badge.green, .comp-badge.fc-green  { background: rgba(16,185,129,0.15); color: #059669; }
  .comp-badge.amber, .comp-badge.fc-amber  { background: rgba(245,158,11,0.15);  color: #d97706; }
  .comp-badge.red,   .comp-badge.fc-red    { background: rgba(239,68,68,0.15);   color: #dc2626; }

  /* ── Level Tag ── */
  .level-tag            { font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; padding: 1px 5px; border-radius: 8px;
                          background: rgba(0,0,0,0.06); color: var(--text-3); margin-left: 4px; }

  /* ── Benchmark Coloring ── */
  .num-green            { color: #059669 !important; font-weight: 700; }
  .num-amber            { color: #d97706 !important; font-weight: 700; }
  .num-red              { color: #dc2626 !important; font-weight: 700; }

  /* ── Col header row ── */
  .col-header-row th    { font-size: 10px; padding: 5px 6px; }

  /* ── Duolingo Animations ── */
  @keyframes fadeInUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }
  @keyframes slideIn {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-12px) scale(0.97); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); }
  }
  @keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
    50%       { transform: scale(1.35); opacity: 0.7; }
  }
  @keyframes miniBarGrow {
    from { width: 0 !important; }
  }
  @keyframes badgePop {
    0%   { transform: scale(0.7); opacity: 0; }
    80%  { transform: scale(1.1); }
    100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
  }
  @keyframes sparkDraw {
    from { stroke-dashoffset: 1000; }
    to   { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
  }

  /* ── Row Stagger ── */
  .row-anim { animation: fadeInUp 0.3s ease both; }

  /* ── Hover Transform ── */
  tbody tr:hover { background: rgba(0,120,212,0.04) !important; transform: translateX(1px); transition: background .12s, transform .12s; }

  /* ── Mini-bar grow ── */
  .mini-bar { animation: miniBarGrow 0.6s ease both; }

  /* ── Badge pop ── */
  .comp-badge { animation: badgePop 0.4s ease both; }

  /* ── Cell Drilldown ── */
  .cell-drilldown {
    cursor: pointer;
    text-decoration: underline dotted;
    text-underline-offset: 2px;
  }
  .cell-drilldown:hover { color: var(--blue) !important; }

  /* ── Spark Popup ── */
  #spark-popup {
    display: none;
    position: fixed;
    z-index: 2000;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.97);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.16);
    padding: 14px 16px;
    min-width: 320px;
    max-width: 360px;
    animation: slideIn 0.2s ease;
  }
  #spark-popup.open { display: block; }
  .spark-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .spark-title { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text-1); }
  .spark-close {
    background: none; border: none; font-size: 16px;
    cursor: pointer; color: var(--text-3); line-height: 1; padding: 2px 4px;
  }
  .spark-close:hover { color: var(--text-1); }
  .spark-chart { line-height: 0; }

  /* ── Coaching Card ── */
  .coaching-card {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0,120,212,0.06), rgba(88,204,2,0.06));
    border: 1px solid rgba(0,120,212,0.12);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 14px 16px;
    margin-top: 4px;
  }
  .coaching-card-title {
    font-size: 11px; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: .06em; color: var(--text-3); margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .coaching-tip {
    display: flex; gap: 10px; padding: 8px 10px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); border-radius: 8px;
    margin-bottom: 6px; align-items: flex-start;
  }
  .coaching-tip:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
  .coaching-tip-emoji { font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.3; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .coaching-tip-title { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text-1); }
  .coaching-tip-detail { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-3); margin-top: 2px; }

  /* ── Sub-note ── */
  .sub-note { font-size: 10px; color: var(--text-3); margin-top: 2px; }

</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="container" id="container">
  <div class="toolbar" id="toolbar">
    <div class="toolbar-filters" id="filter-btns">
      <button class="filter-btn active" onclick="setFilter('all')">Alle</button>
      <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setFilter('wolves')">Wolves</button>
      <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setFilter('titans')">Titans</button>
      <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setFilter('locos')">Locos</button>
    </div>
    <select id="quarter-select" style="margin-left:12px;padding:5px 10px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.15);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;background:#fff;color:#1a1a2e;cursor:pointer" onchange="setQuarter(this.value)">
    </select>
    <button class="refresh-btn" onclick="doRefresh()">↻ Aktualisieren</button>
  </div>
  <div id="table-wrap">
    <div class="empty">Lade Daten…</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="modal-overlay" id="modal-overlay" onclick="closeModal(event)">
  <div class="modal" id="modal-content" onclick="event.stopPropagation()"></div>
</div>
<div id="spark-popup">
  <div class="spark-header">
    <span class="spark-title"></span>
    <button class="spark-close" onclick="closeSparkPopup()">✕</button>
  </div>
  <div class="spark-chart"></div>
</div>

<script>
  var _allReps    = [];
  var _medals     = {};
  var _weeklyData = {};
  var _wk         = {};
  var _staleList  = [];
  var _teamFilter = 'all';
  var _sortCol    = 'composite';
  var _sortDir    = 'desc';
  var _weeksElapsed = 1;

  function fmt(n) {
    if (!n) return '—';
    const abs = Math.round(Math.abs(n));
    if (abs >= 1000000) return (abs/1000000).toFixed(1).replace('.',',') + ' Mio.';
    if (abs >= 1000)    return Math.round(abs/1000) + 'k';
    return abs.toString();
  }
  function fmtFull(n) {
    if (!n || n === 0) return '€ 0';
    const abs = Math.round(Math.abs(n));
    return '€ ' + abs.toString().replace(/\B(?=(\d{3})+(?!\d))/g, '.');
  }
  function fmtN(n) { return (n || 0).toString().replace(/\B(?=(\d{3})+(?!\d))/g, '.'); }
  function statusLabel(s) {
    return { green: 'Gesund', amber: 'Warnung', red: 'Kritisch' }[s] || '—';
  }
  function col(s) {
    return { green: 'var(--green)', amber: 'var(--amber)', red: 'var(--red)' }[s] || 'var(--text-2)';
  }
  function pct(n) { return (n || 0) + '\u202f%'; }
    function fmtD(n) { return ((n || 0).toFixed(1)).replace('.', ','); }
  function clamp(v, mn, mx) { return Math.max(mn, Math.min(mx, v)); }

  function teamClass(team) {
    return { ferdinand: 'team-ferdinand', jan: 'team-jan', philipp: 'team-philipp' }[team] || '';
  }
  function teamEmoji(team) {
    return { wolves: '🐺', titans: '⚡', locos: '😈' }[team] || '';
  }
  function teamLabel(team) {
    return { wolves: 'Wolves', titans: 'Titans', locos: 'Locos' }[team] || (team || '—');
  }
  function levelLabel(level) {
    return { '3': 'L3', '2': 'L2', '1': 'L1', 'rampup': 'Ramp' }[level] || 'L2';
  }
  function statusColor(v, thresholds, inverted) {
    if (inverted) {
      if (v <= thresholds[0]) return 'num-green';
      if (v <= thresholds[1]) return 'num-amber';
      return 'num-red';
    }
    if (v >= thresholds[0]) return 'num-green';
    if (v >= thresholds[1]) return 'num-amber';
    return 'num-red';
  }

  function setFilter(team) {
    _teamFilter = team;
    document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(function(b) {
      b.classList.toggle('active', b.getAttribute('onclick').indexOf("'" + team + "'") !== -1);
    });
    renderTable();
    var evtMap = { all: 'onFilterAll', wolves: 'onFilterWolves', titans: 'onFilterTitans', locos: 'onFilterLocos' };
    if (typeof appsmith !== 'undefined' && evtMap[team]) {
      appsmith.triggerEvent(evtMap[team]);
    }
  }

  // ── Quartals-Filter ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  var _currentQuarter = null;

  function setQuarter(val) {
    _currentQuarter = val;
    appsmith.triggerEvent('onQuarterChange', { quarter: val });
  }

  function populateQuarterDropdown(model) {
    var sel = document.getElementById('quarter-select');
    if (!sel) return;
    var opts = (model && model.quarterOptions) ? model.quarterOptions : [];
    var curr = (model && model.selectedQuarter) ? model.selectedQuarter : '';
    sel.innerHTML = '';
    if (!opts.length) {
      var opt = document.createElement('option');
      opt.value = '';
      opt.textContent = 'Laufendes Quartal';
      sel.appendChild(opt);
      return;
    }
    opts.forEach(function(o) {
      var opt = document.createElement('option');
      opt.value = o.value;
      opt.textContent = o.label;
      if (o.value === curr) opt.selected = true;
      sel.appendChild(opt);
    });
  }


  function doRefresh() {
    if (typeof appsmith !== 'undefined') {
      appsmith.triggerEvent('onRefresh');
    }
  }

  function sortBy(col) {
    if (_sortCol === col) {
      _sortDir = _sortDir === 'desc' ? 'asc' : 'desc';
    } else {
      _sortCol = col;
      _sortDir = 'desc';
    }
    renderTable();
  }

  function filteredSortedReps() {
    var reps = _teamFilter === 'all'
      ? _allReps.slice()
      : _allReps.filter(function(r) { return r.team === _teamFilter; });

    var col = _sortCol;
    var dir = _sortDir === 'desc' ? -1 : 1;

    reps.sort(function(a, b) {
      var av = 0, bv = 0;
      if      (col === 'name')     { return dir * (a.repName||'').localeCompare(b.repName||''); }
      else if (col === 'touch')    { av = a.l30TouchPerDay     || 0; bv = b.l30TouchPerDay     || 0; }
      else if (col === 'calls')    { av = a.l30DialsPerDay     || 0; bv = b.l30DialsPerDay     || 0; }
      else if (col === 'mails')    { av = a.l30EmailsPerDay    || 0; bv = b.l30EmailsPerDay    || 0; }
      else if (col === 'qt')       { av = a.l30QualPerDay      || 0; bv = b.l30QualPerDay      || 0; }
      else if (col === 'qc')       { av = a.l30QualCallsPerDay || 0; bv = b.l30QualCallsPerDay || 0; }
      else if (col === 'mtg')      { av = a.l30MeetingsPerDay  || 0; bv = b.l30MeetingsPerDay  || 0; }
      else if (col === 'tToQt')    { av = a.l30TouchToQual     || 0; bv = b.l30TouchToQual     || 0; }
      else if (col === 'qtToO')    { av = a.l30QualToOpp       || 0; bv = b.l30QualToOpp       || 0; }
      else if (col === 'oppPerDay') { av = a.l30OppPerDay       || 0; bv = b.l30OppPerDay       || 0; }
      else if (col === 'cov')      { av = a.coverageVal        || 0; bv = b.coverageVal        || 0; }
      else if (col === 'stale')    { av = 100-(a.staleRateVal||0); bv = 100-(b.staleRateVal||0); }
      else if (col === 'ovd')      { av = a.overdueCount       || 0; bv = b.overdueCount       || 0; }
      else if (col === 'pilots')   { av = a.pilotenCount       || 0; bv = b.pilotenCount       || 0; }
      else if (col === 'bookings') { av = a.bookingsARR        || 0; bv = b.bookingsARR        || 0; }
      else if (col === 'wr')       { av = a.winRateVal         || 0; bv = b.winRateVal         || 0; }
      else if (col === 'composite'){ av = a.composite          || 0; bv = b.composite          || 0; }
      else if (col === 'fc')       { av = a.compositeForecast  || 0; bv = b.compositeForecast  || 0; }
      else if (col === 'cmt')      { av = a.commitAtt          || 0; bv = b.commitAtt          || 0; }
      else if (col === 'dev')      { av = a.commitDeviation    || 0; bv = b.commitDeviation    || 0; }
      return (av - bv) * dir;
    });
    return reps;
  }

  function arrowHtml(col) {
    if (_sortCol !== col) return '<span class="sort-arrow" style="opacity:.3">↕</span>';
    return '<span class="sort-arrow">' + (_sortDir === 'desc' ? '↓' : '↑') + '</span>';
  }

  function thClass(col, extra) {
    var cls = extra || '';
    if (_sortCol === col) cls += ' sort-active';
    return cls;
  }

  function pctOf(val, max) { return max > 0 ? Math.round((val || 0) / max * 100) : 0; }
  function fcStatus(v)      { return (v||0) >= 80 ? 'green' : (v||0) >= 60 ? 'amber' : 'red'; }
  function deviationCls(v)   { return (v||0) >= 0 ? 'green' : (v||0) >= -10 ? 'amber' : 'red'; }
  function pilotStatus(r) {
    if (!r.pilotenTarget) return '';
    var p = (r.pilotenCount || 0) / r.pilotenTarget * 100;
    return p >= 100 ? 'num-green' : p >= 60 ? 'num-amber' : 'num-red';
  }

  function renderTable() {
    var reps = filteredSortedReps();
    var c = document.getElementById('table-wrap');

    if (!reps.length) {
      c.innerHTML = '<div class="empty">Keine Daten</div>';
      return;
    }

    // Pre-pass: maxima for mini-bars + medal map (top 3 by composite, all reps)
    var maxTouch = 0, maxQT = 0;
    reps.forEach(function(r) {
      var t = r.l30TouchPerDay || 0;
      var q = r.l30QualPerDay  || 0;
      if (t > maxTouch) maxTouch = t;
      if (q > maxQT)    maxQT    = q;
    });

    // Medals: top 3 by composite across ALL reps (global ranking)
    var _medalsSorted = _allReps.slice().sort(function(a,b){ return (b.composite||0)-(a.composite||0); });
    _medals = {};
    if (_medalsSorted[0]) _medals[_medalsSorted[0].id] = '🥇';
    if (_medalsSorted[1]) _medals[_medalsSorted[1].id] = '🥈';
    if (_medalsSorted[2]) _medals[_medalsSorted[2].id] = '🥉';

    // Group header row
    var groupRow =
      '<tr class="group-header-row">' +
        '<th></th>' +
        '<th colspan="6" class="gh gh-blue">📞 Aktivität (L30/Tag)</th>' +
        '<th colspan="3" class="gh gh-green">🎯 Conversion</th>' +
        '<th colspan="3" class="gh gh-amber">📊 Pipeline</th>' +
        '<th colspan="3" class="gh gh-gray">🏆 Results</th>' +
        '<th colspan="4" class="gh gh-purple">🔮 Forecast</th>' +
      '</tr>';

    // Column header row
    var colRow =
      '<tr class="col-header-row">' +
        th2('name', 'Rep', 'left', 'Rep-Name, Level und Team') +
        th2('touch',    'Touch',  null, 'Touchpoints/Tag: Calls + Emails (Meetings zählen nicht, Ø letzte 30 Arbeitstage)') +
        th2('calls',    'Calls',  null, 'Anrufe pro Arbeitstag (Ø L30)') +
        th2('mails',    'Mails',  null, 'E-Mails pro Arbeitstag (Ø L30)') +
        th2('qt',       'QT',     null, 'Qualifizierte Touchpoints pro Arbeitstag (Ø L30)') +
        th2('qc',       'QC',     null, 'Qualifizierte Anrufe pro Arbeitstag (Ø L30)') +
        th2('mtg',      'Mtg',    null, 'Meetings pro Arbeitstag (Ø L30)') +
        th2('tToQt',    'T→QT',   null, 'Touch-zu-Qual-Rate: Anteil qualifizierter Touchpoints (L30)') +
        th2('qtToO',    'QT→O',   null, 'Qual-zu-Opp-Rate: Anteil qualifizierter Touchpoints die zu Opps werden (L30)') +
        th2('oppPerDay','O/D',    null, 'Neu erstellte Opps pro Arbeitstag (Ø L30). Pfeil = Trend CW vs. L30-Schnitt') +
        th2('cov',      'Cov',    null, 'Pipeline Coverage: offene Pipeline ÷ verbleibende Quota. Ziel: ≥ 2,5×') +
        th2('stale',    'Pipe%',  null, 'Pipeline-Gesundheit: Anteil offener Opps MIT Aktivität. 100 % = keine Stale Opps. Ziel: ≥ 85 %') +
        th2('ovd',      'Ovd',    null, 'Überfällige Opps: CloseDate liegt in der Vergangenheit und Opp ist noch offen') +
        th2('pilots',   'Pilots', null, 'Pilot-Deals QTD vs. Quartalsziel') +
        th2('bookings', 'Book.',  null, 'Gebuchter ARR QTD (rep-getrieben, ohne Self-Service)') +
        th2('wr',       'WR%',    null, 'Win Rate: gewonnene ÷ (gewonnene + verlorene) Opps, letzte 90 Tage. Ziel: ≥ 30 %') +
        th2('composite','Comp',   null, 'Composite TA: gewichteter Zielerreichungsgrad (Bookings + Piloten je nach Level)') +
        th2('cmt',      'Commit', null, 'SF Forecast Commit: abgegebener Forecast des Reps als % vom Target') +
        th2('fc',       'HR',     null, 'Hochrechnung: Prognose am Quartalsende bei aktuellem Run-Rate-Tempo') +
        th2('dev',      'Δ%',     null, 'Abweichung: Commit vs. HR. + = Commit optimistischer als HR, − = konservativ') +
      '</tr>';

    function th2(col, label, align, tip) {
      var cls = (_sortCol === col) ? 'sort-active' : '';
      if (align === 'left') cls += ' th-left';
      var arrow = (_sortCol === col)
        ? '<span class="sort-arrow">' + (_sortDir === 'desc' ? '↓' : '↑') + '</span>'
        : '<span class="sort-arrow" style="opacity:.3">↕</span>';
      var t = tip ? ' title="' + tip + '"' : '';
      return '<th onclick="sortBy(\'' + col + '\')" class="' + cls.trim() + '"' + t + '>' + label + arrow + '</th>';
    }

    function fmtD(v) { return v != null ? v.toFixed(1).replace('.', ',') : '—'; }
    function pct2(v) { return v != null ? Math.round(v) + '%' : '—'; }
    function fmt2(v) {
      if (v == null) return '—';
      if (v >= 1000000) return (v/1000000).toFixed(1).replace('.',',') + 'M';
      if (v >= 1000)    return Math.round(v/1000) + 'k';
      return Math.round(v) + '';
    }
    function sc(val, thresholds, inverted) {
      var v = val || 0;
      if (!inverted) {
        return v >= thresholds.green ? 'num-green' : v >= thresholds.amber ? 'num-amber' : 'num-red';
      } else {
        return v <= thresholds.green ? 'num-green' : v <= thresholds.amber ? 'num-amber' : 'num-red';
      }
    }

    var rows = '';
    reps.forEach(function(r, i) {
      var tT = r.l30TrendTouch || { arrow: '→', cls: 'neutral' };
      var tQ = r.l30TrendQual  || { arrow: '→', cls: 'neutral' };

      var touchPct = pctOf(r.l30TouchPerDay, maxTouch);
      var qtPct    = pctOf(r.l30QualPerDay, maxQT);

      var pilotsStr = r.pilotenTarget > 0
        ? (r.pilotenCount || 0) + '/' + r.pilotenTarget
        : (r.pilotenCount || 0) + '';

      var ovdCls = (r.overdueCount||0) > 5 ? 'num-red' : (r.overdueCount||0) > 0 ? 'num-amber' : '';
      var fcCls  = fcStatus(r.compositeForecast);
      var cmpCls = r.overallStatus || fcStatus(r.composite);

      var _sbc = r.overallStatus === 'green' ? '#58cc02' : r.overallStatus === 'red' ? '#ff4b4b' : '#ff9600';
      rows +=
        '<tr onclick="openModal(\'' + r.id + '\')" class="row-anim" style="border-left: 3px solid ' + _sbc + '; animation-delay: ' + (i * 0.03).toFixed(2) + 's">' +
        // Rep name + medal + level tag + team tag
        '<td class="td-name">' +
          (_medals[r.id] ? '<span class="medal">' + _medals[r.id] + '</span> ' : '') +
          (r.repName || '—') +
          ' <span class="level-tag">' + levelLabel(r.level) + (r.isRampup ? ' <span class="ramp-tag" title="Ramp-up (Probezeit)">🌱</span>' : '') + '</span>' +
          ' <span class="team-tag team-tag--' + (r.team||'') + '" title="' + teamLabel(r.team) + '">' + teamEmoji(r.team) + '</span>' +
        '</td>' +
        // Touch/Tag with mini-bar + trend
        '<td class="' + sc(r.l30TouchPerDay, {green:30, amber:20}) + '">' +
          '<div class="cell-val"><span class="cell-drilldown" onclick="event.stopPropagation();openSparkPopup(event,\'' + r.id + '\',\'touch\')">' + fmtD(r.l30TouchPerDay) + '</span>' +
            ' <span class="trend ' + tT.cls + '">' + tT.arrow + '</span>' +
          '</div>' +
          '<div class="mini-bar-track"><div class="mini-bar mini-bar--blue" style="width:' + touchPct + '%"></div></div>' +
        '</td>' +
        // Calls
        '<td class="sub-col"><span class="cell-drilldown" onclick="event.stopPropagation();openSparkPopup(event,\'' + r.id + '\',\'calls\')">' + fmtD(r.l30DialsPerDay) + '</span></td>' +
        // Mails
        '<td class="sub-col"><span class="cell-drilldown" onclick="event.stopPropagation();openSparkPopup(event,\'' + r.id + '\',\'mails\')">' + fmtD(r.l30EmailsPerDay) + '</span></td>' +
        // QT with mini-bar + trend
        '<td class="' + sc(r.l30QualPerDay, {green:5, amber:3}) + '">' +
          '<div class="cell-val"><span class="cell-drilldown" onclick="event.stopPropagation();openSparkPopup(event,\'' + r.id + '\',\'qt\')">' + fmtD(r.l30QualPerDay) + '</span>' +
            ' <span class="trend ' + tQ.cls + '">' + tQ.arrow + '</span>' +
          '</div>' +
          '<div class="mini-bar-track"><div class="mini-bar mini-bar--green" style="width:' + qtPct + '%"></div></div>' +
        '</td>' +
        // QC

  function coachingTips(r) {
    var tips = [];
    var level = r.level || '2';
    var bm = { '3': 25, '2': 30, '1': 35, 'rampup': 30 }[level] || 30;
    var quarterProgress = (_wk && _wk.total > 0) ? (_wk.done / _wk.total) : 0.5;
    if ((r.l30TouchPerDay || 0) < bm * 0.7) {
      var lowAct = (r.l30DialsPerDay || 0) < (r.l30EmailsPerDay || 0) ? 'Calls' : 'Mails';
      tips.push({ prio: 1, emoji: '📞', title: 'Mehr Aktivität', detail: 'Touch/Tag ' + fmtD(r.l30TouchPerDay || 0) + ' vs. Benchmark ' + bm + '. Fokus auf ' + lowAct + '.' });
    }
    if ((r.l30TouchToQual || 0) < 10) {
      tips.push({ prio: 1, emoji: '🎯', title: 'Gesprächsqualität', detail: 'Nur ' + Math.round(r.l30TouchToQual || 0) + '% Touch→Qual. Pitch-Coaching oder Zielgruppen-Review.' });
    }
    if ((r.coverageVal || 0) < 1.5) {
      tips.push({ prio: 1, emoji: '🚨', title: 'Pipeline aufbauen', detail: 'Coverage ' + fmtD(r.coverageVal || 0) + 'x (Ziel 2,5x). Mehr Opportunities generieren.' });
    }
    if ((r.staleRateVal || 0) > 30) {
      tips.push({ prio: 2, emoji: '🧹', title: 'Pipeline aufräumen', detail: (r.staleCount || 0) + ' Opps seit >14 Tagen ohne Aktivität.' });
    }
    if ((r.overdueCount || 0) > 3) {
      tips.push({ prio: 2, emoji: '⏰', title: 'Überfällige Deals', detail: (r.overdueCount || 0) + ' Opps mit abgelaufenem CloseDate.' });
    }
    if ((r.winRateVal || 0) < 20) {
      tips.push({ prio: 2, emoji: '📉', title: 'Win Rate bei ' + Math.round(r.winRateVal || 0) + '%', detail: 'Deal-Qualification prüfen.' });
    }
    if ((r.pilotenWeight || 0) > 0 && (r.pilotenAtt || 0) < (quarterProgress * 100 - 10)) {
      tips.push({ prio: 2, emoji: '🎯', title: 'Piloten-Rückstand', detail: (r.pilotenCount || 0) + '/' + (r.pilotenTarget || 0) + '. Pilot-Opps pushen.' });
    }
    if ((r.compositeForecast || 0) < 80) {
      tips.push({ prio: 3, emoji: '🔮', title: 'Forecast bei ' + Math.round(r.compositeForecast || 0) + '%', detail: 'Pipeline-Aufbau + Deal-Acceleration nötig.' });
    }
    tips.sort(function(a, b) { return a.prio - b.prio; });
    tips = tips.slice(0, 3);
    if (!tips.length) {
      tips.push({ prio: 0, emoji: '✅', title: 'Auf Kurs!', detail: 'Alle KPIs im grünen Bereich.' });
    }
    return tips;
  }

  function svgSparkline(points, opts) {
    opts = opts || {};
    var W = 280, H = 130, pL = 28, pR = 14, pT = 12, pB = 24;
    var iW = W - pL - pR, iH = H - pT - pB;
    if (!points || points.length < 2) {
      return '<svg viewBox="0 0 ' + W + ' ' + H + '" style="width:100%;height:' + H + 'px"><text x="' + (W/2) + '" y="' + (H/2+4) + '" text-anchor="middle" fill="#9090b0" font-size="12" font-family="system-ui">Keine Daten</text></svg>';
    }
    var vals = points.map(function(p) { return p.value || 0; });
    var maxV = opts.yMax != null ? opts.yMax : Math.max.apply(null, vals.concat([0.01]));
    function xp(i) { return pL + (points.length > 1 ? (i / (points.length - 1)) * iW : iW / 2); }
    function yp(v) { return pT + iH - (v / (maxV || 1)) * iH; }
    var path = points.map(function(p, i) { return (i === 0 ? 'M' : 'L') + xp(i).toFixed(1) + ',' + yp(p.value || 0).toFixed(1); }).join(' ');
    var fill = path + ' L' + xp(points.length-1).toFixed(1) + ',' + (pT+iH) + ' L' + pL + ',' + (pT+iH) + ' Z';
    var gid = 'g' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 5);
    var c = opts.color || '#0078d4';
    var pl = iW * 1.6;
    var refHtml = '';
    if (opts.refValue != null) {
      var ry = yp(Math.min(opts.refValue, maxV * 1.05)).toFixed(1);
      refHtml = '<line x1="' + pL + '" y1="' + ry + '" x2="' + (pL+iW) + '" y2="' + ry + '" stroke="#9090b0" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,3" opacity="0.6"/><text x="' + (pL+iW+2) + '" y="' + (Number(ry)+4) + '" font-size="9" fill="#9090b0">BM</text>';
    }
    var line2Html = '';
    if (opts.line2 && opts.line2.length >= 2) {
      var p2 = opts.line2;
      var maxV2 = opts.yMax != null ? opts.yMax : Math.max(maxV, Math.max.apply(null, p2.map(function(p) { return p.value || 0; })));
      function yp2(v) { return pT + iH - (v / (maxV2 || 1)) * iH; }
      var path2 = p2.map(function(p, i) { return (i===0?'M':'L') + xp(i).toFixed(1) + ',' + yp2(p.value||0).toFixed(1); }).join(' ');
      line2Html = '<path d="' + path2 + '" fill="none" stroke="#9090b0" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="5,3" opacity="0.7"/>';
    }
    var xLabels = '';
    points.forEach(function(p, i) {
      if (i === 0 || i === points.length-1 || points.length <= 6) {
        xLabels += '<text x="' + xp(i).toFixed(1) + '" y="' + (H-5) + '" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#9090b0" font-family="system-ui">' + (p.label||'') + '</text>';
      }
    });
    var dots = points.map(function(p, i) {
      return '<circle cx="' + xp(i).toFixed(1) + '" cy="' + yp(p.value||0).toFixed(1) + '" r="3" fill="' + c + '" opacity="0.9"><title>' + (p.label||'') + ': ' + (p.value||0) + '</title></circle>';
    }).join('');
    return '<svg viewBox="0 0 ' + W + ' ' + H + '" style="width:100%;height:' + H + 'px" font-family="system-ui">' +
      '<defs><linearGradient id="' + gid + '" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">' +
        '<stop offset="0%" stop-color="' + c + '" stop-opacity="0.2"/>' +
        '<stop offset="100%" stop-color="' + c + '" stop-opacity="0.01"/>' +
      '</linearGradient></defs>' +
      '<path d="' + fill + '" fill="url(#' + gid + ')"/>' +
      refHtml + line2Html +
      '<path d="' + path + '" fill="none" stroke="' + c + '" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-dasharray="' + pl + '" stroke-dashoffset="' + pl + '" style="animation:sparkDraw 0.8s ease forwards"/>' +
      '<text x="' + (pL-2) + '" y="' + (pT+5) + '" text-anchor="end" font-size="9" fill="#9090b0">' + Math.round(maxV) + '</text>' +
      '<text x="' + (pL-2) + '" y="' + (pT+iH) + '" text-anchor="end" font-size="9" fill="#9090b0">0</text>' +
      xLabels + dots + '</svg>';
  }

  }

  function extract(m) {
    if (!m) return { reps: [], weeksElapsed: 1, staleList: [], weeklyData: {} };
    return {
      reps:         Array.isArray(m) ? m : (m.reps || []),
      weeksElapsed: m.weeksElapsed || 1,
      staleList:    m.staleList || [],
      wk:           m.wk || {},
      weeklyData:   m.weeklyData || {},
    };
  }

  function modelKey(m) {
    return (m && m.reps || []).reduce(function(s,r){ return s+(r.bookingsTarget||0); }, 0);
  }

  var _lastKey = null;
  function poll() {
    if (typeof appsmith !== 'undefined' && appsmith.model) {
      var key = modelKey(appsmith.model);
      if (key !== _lastKey) { _lastKey = key; render(extract(appsmith.model)); }
    }
    setTimeout(poll, 300);
  }

  if (typeof appsmith !== 'undefined') {
    appsmith.onReady(function() { render(extract(appsmith.model)); poll(); });
    appsmith.onModelChange(function(m) { render(extract(m)); });
  } else {
    render({ reps: [], weeksElapsed: 1, staleList: [] });
  }
</script>
</body>
</html>
